Who I Am

The Person

Uzo Nnabike
Founder · Builder · Lagos

I believe the gap between a good idea and a working product should be measured in days, not months.

Solo founder based in Lagos. I operate at the intersection of software engineering, product management, and business development — building across multiple ventures simultaneously with AI as the core force multiplier.

My work is rooted in a deep conviction about African markets: underserved businesses deserve tools built for them. Not adapted Western products. Purpose-built, from scratch.

Moving Fast
Right Now
Looking for the Right People
I'm not just posting work here — I'm actively looking for people to build with. If you have an idea, need a technical partner, or just want to test something I've made, reach out. I reply fast.
  • Partner on a product from scratch
  • Help you go from idea to first users
  • Test and give feedback on my apps
  • Talk to investors (pre-seed stage)
  • Take on contract product work
  • Or just have a good conversation
